name: Bhagyanagar India Limited
summary: Bhagyanagar India Limited manufactures copper products in India. It operates through Manufacturing of Copper Products and Wind Power segments. The company offers copper bus bars, wires and rods, foils and sheets, paper covered strips, nuggets, and tubes and pipes, as well paper insulated copper conductors. It also provides solar flat plate collectors, commutators, solar fins, field coils and armature pins, submersible wires, and heating elements/thermostats/immersion heaters. The company primarily serves original equipment manufacturers in the auto and electrical component, solar, and electrical engineering industries. In addition, it operates a wind power project with an installed capacity of 9 megawatts at Kapatigudda, Karnataka. Bhagyanagar India Limited was founded in 1985 and is based in Secunderabad, India.
